name: mojo
description: Teach coding agents to write idiomatic, correct, performant, current Mojo (Modular's language)

interface.longDescription: Helps agents write, port, review, and optimize Mojo. Embeds the Mojo v1.0.0b1 version map to prevent stale pre-2025 syntax (fn, owned/borrowed/inout, @value, NDBuffer), with guidance for fundamentals, ownership, traits, comptime, performance (SIMD/vectorize/parallelize), and GPU kernels (DeviceContext, LayoutTensor).
defaultPrompt: Write a Mojo struct with SIMD ops
Port this Python function to Mojo
Write a GPU kernel in Mojo
